headline: Global chip stocks surge as blowout Micron results reignite AI rally
summary: Global chip stocks surged on Thursday after Micron Technology’s blockbuster results reignited the AI-driven rally, lifting tech shares from Seoul to Frankfurt as investors grew ‌more confident about persistent demand and tightening supply.  Micron, a key supplier for Nvidia's AI chipsets alongside South Korean ‌chipmakers, forecast quarterly profit and revenue well above expectations on Wednesday and said its customers had committed $22 billion to lock in supplies of memory chips.  The read-across ​was immediate in Europe, where Dutch chip-equipment maker ASML, the region's most valuable company, rose more than 4% following two days of heavy losses triggered by investors taking profits after a record surge.

content.title: Global chip stocks surge as blowout Micron results reignite AI rally
content.summary: Global chip stocks surged on Thursday after Micron Technology’s blockbuster results reignited the AI-driven rally, lifting tech shares from Seoul to Frankfurt as investors grew ‌more confident about persistent demand and tightening supply.  Micron, a key supplier for Nvidia's AI chipsets alongside South Korean ‌chipmakers, forecast quarterly profit and revenue well above expectations on Wednesday and said its customers had committed $22 billion to lock in supplies of memory chips.  The read-across ​was immediate in Europe, where Dutch chip-equipment maker ASML, the region's most valuable company, rose more than 4% following two days of heavy losses triggered by investors taking profits after a record surge.

thumbnail.caption: FILE PHOTO: Illustration shows computer motherboard and chip
